nodes.label: Boiler B-501
nodes.details: High-Pressure Steam Boiler. Critical utility asset. Design pressure: 30 kg/cm2.

nodes.label: Pump P-102A
nodes.details: Centrifugal Barrier Fluid Pump. Model-X. Dual mechanical seal plan 53B.

nodes.label: Compressor C-301
nodes.details: Reciprocating Gas Compressor handling highly flammable hydrocarbons.

nodes.label: Control Valve CV-402
nodes.details: Fuel Gas Flow Control Valve. Air-to-open safety position.

nodes.label: SOP-B501-STARTUP
nodes.details: Standard Operating Procedure for Boiler B-501 cold startup sequence.

nodes.label: OEM-P102A-MANUAL
nodes.details: OEM Centrifugal Pump Maintenance Manual. Maintenance rules & bearing specs.

nodes.label: REG-OISD-118
nodes.details: OISD Layout standard. Requires 15m safe spacing for gas compressors.

nodes.label: INSP-PESO-2025
nodes.details: PESO inspection certificate. Valid until October 2026.

nodes.label: SOP-C301-EMERGENCY
nodes.details: Emergency ESD and vent procedures for Compressor C-301.

nodes.label: Factory Act 1948
nodes.details: Section 31 covers statutory testing of pressure systems in plants.

nodes.label: OISD Directorate
nodes.details: Oil Industry Safety Directorate. Sets guidelines for oil/gas sector.

nodes.label: PESO Authority
nodes.details: Petroleum and Explosives Safety Organization. Indian statutory authority.

nodes.label: INC-2025-0812
nodes.details: Pump seal failure. Cavitation due to suction valve blockage. Mechanical seal cracked.

nodes.label: INC-2026-0304
nodes.details: Boiler pressure overshoot. Control valve CV-402 stuck in 80% open position.

nodes.label: Factory Spacing Rule 2026
nodes.details: Compressor C-301 requires at least 20m of separation distance from nearby assets for compliance with the Factory Spacing Rule 2026....
